message:
feat(doom-overlay): add download progress callbacks, abort timeout, and
improved error reporting to WAD file finder

Improve the doom-overlay test extension's WAD file handling:

wad-finder.ts:
- Add onProgress callback parameter to ensureWadFile() for reporting
  download status back to the extension UI
- Add WAD_DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT_MS (20s) abort controller to prevent fetch
  from hanging indefinitely on slow/unresponsive mirrors
- Emit progress messages at each stage: checking local, found existing,
  downloading, downloaded with byte count, and download failure with
  error details
- Capture and report the error object on download failure instead of
  silently returning null

index.ts:
- Pass a progress callback to ensureWadFile() that forwards status
  messages through ctx.ui.notify() so the user sees download progress
  in the extension overlay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
